title: euaggelistes #2099
definition:
1) a bringer of good tidings, an evangelist
 2) the name given to the NT heralds of salvation through Christ who
    are not apostles
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a bringer of good tidings, an evangelist
 2) the name given to the NT heralds of salvation through Christ who
    are not apostles

    NASB:  an evangelist, a bringer of good news:
